entry.title: Re: Readiness Check Run for S/4HANA "FOUNDATION" System U...
entry.content:
Hi Ashish,

To date, there are no applicable simplification items for SAP S/4HANA Foundation. As a result, there is no SAP Readiness Check for SAP S/4HANA Foundation. Additionally, as there are no applicable simplification items, Software Update Manager (SUM) does not perform the precheck activities you have observed with a full-stack SAP S/4HANA system. In preparation for an SAP S/4HANA Foundation upgrade, we recommend reviewing the applicable guides and SAP Notes for SUM, the target SAP S/4HANA Foundation version, and any installed add-on instances (if applicable).

Best Regards,
Greg

entry.title: Migration roadmap from ECC to S4/HANA with two SIDs
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

 

I'm currently studying a client with a tipical architecture: 2 System ID's, one for IS-U data and a second for other ECC data (FI, CO, SD, etc). Is there any constraint, document, recomendation, notes or insights by SAP regarding the usage of one client when migrating to a private cloud? 

 

Thank y'all in advance.

entry.title: Re: ELIKZ Object of Authority
entry.content:
Hi,

Your question is not clear, but EKPO-ELKIZ is a delivery completed indicator in PO line items, which can be check automatically by completing a GR for that line item or user can also manually check that field if no more GR is required.

Thanks,

Sanan

entry.content: olaaaaa

entry.title: Re: Automatically block Concur expense posting for every WBS
entry.content:
Hi,

You can consider using the Commercial project create, update API for this. https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/45b4711dbb3744e79dff55cb4eff45bc/5275730eeb0b4509afd125f524377168.html to have the workpackages updated after it is initially created. It the project is created via the API, then you can set the block to begin with.

Regards,

Dennis

entry.title: Re: DatePicker Input Changing to Unix Epoch
entry.content: just check what you send to backend from the network tab.

entry.title: Re: Technology, Travels & Tales: Learning for Life Through Exploration
entry.content:
Throughout my career, my passion for SAP has been a driving force in my professional journey. I began with SAP ABAP, moved to SAP HCM, and eventually transitioned to SuccessFactors and Enterprise Architecture. My experience in consulting with Big4 firms for over a decade allowed me to travel globally, enriching my understanding of diverse business landscapes. I am committed to lifelong learning, frequently attending conferences like SAP TechEd, EA events, webinars, and community gatherings.

SAP TechED

 

SAP Inside Track

 

A Rainy Weekend at a Client Place in India

 

Integrating Technology, Spirituality, Travel , Patriotism Spirit all together

 

Recent Small Win in Content creation in SAP SuccessFactors & EA

 

 

 

Despite registering for more courses than my learning bandwidth could handle, my dedication to education, experience, and exposure has been unwavering. I have contributed to YouTube and Medium blogs and have taken on roles in teaching, mentoring, and coaching within the HR Tech space. Today, as the Founder and Enterprise Architect for a leading EdTech company, SuccessLabs Academy, I continue to leverage my expertise to innovate and inspire in the field of education technology.    

 

Regards,

Niladri

entry.title: Re: SAP EWM Screen Personas - Field cannot be moved
entry.content: Hi Per, since the RFUI framework poses unique challenges for Personas, we have a lot of RF-specific coding targeting these use cases. This area is relatively new to us (compared to the rest of Personas), so we are working through eventual issues that may be related to this topic. If you have problems that need addressing, please create corresponding incidents with reproducible examples, so we can attend to them.

entry.title: Create folder structure in a shared network folder with SAP
entry.content:
Hello, good day to all
I have a shared network folder with SAP, but I need to create a folder structure to save some files from SAP. Can someone guide me to carry out this process?

Thank you very much

entry.title: Client Handling in AMDP
entry.content:
What is AMDP?

  • ABAP Managed Database Procedures (AMDP) are the preferred way for developing SAP HANA DB procedures on the ABAP platform.
  • AMDPs allow you as an ABAP developer to write database procedures directly in ABAP. Special ABAP classes (so-called AMDP classes) can contain embedded code (SQLScript) that is used to generate DB procedures in the SAP HANA DB layer.
  •  AMDP is written in a database-specific language, such as Native SQL or SQLScript, and is implemented within an AMDP method body of an AMDP class.

AMDP Documentation

How can you integrate AMDP into ABAP CDS?

  • ABAP CDS provides a framework for defining and consuming semantic data models on the central database of the application server AS ABAP. 
  • Complex calculations can be pushed down to HANA through code pushdown and data can be retrieved into CDS through AMDPs. 
  • ABAP CDS acts as a container to retrieve data from database through AMDPs.
  • A CDS view has a field that cannot be calculated with ABAP SQL; then AMDP can be used to implement the calculation logic via Native SQL and code pushdown.

What features in ABAP CDS support AMDPs?

  • Table functions
  • Scalar functions

Table functions

  • ABAP CDS table functions are implemented natively on the database and can be called in CDS.
  • Table functions accept multiple input parameters and return multiple values as a tabular data set.

                    Implementation class                                             Implementation logic 

CDS Table functions documentation  

Scalar functions

  • An SQL-based scalar function (implemented with SQLScript) is a user-defined function that accepts multiple input parameters and returns exactly one scalar value.
  • A scalar function allows developers to encapsulate complex algorithms into manageable, reusable code that can then be used in all operand positions of CDS view entities that expect scalar values.
  • AMDP based scalar functions are visible and accessible in ABAP CDS views.

How is client handling handled in AMDP?

AMDP in general does not support implicit client handling. When accessing client-dependent database tables or views in an AMDP method, the required client ID must be selected explicitly. 

CDS Scalar functions documentation 

Client handling in CDS Table functions

Client handling in CDS table functions is controlled via annotations.

The CDS annotation @ClientDependent can be used to switch client dependency on and off for a CDS table function in ABAP CDS (the default setting is on).

  • The value #CLIENT_DEPENDENT enables client dependency.
  • The value #CLIENT_INDEPENDENT disables client dependency.

CDS table functions can be either client-dependent or -independent. More details on client dependency and its consequences for the CDS entitites and AMDP implementations can be found here.

Client handling in scalar functions

  • Client handling has not yet been implemented for CDS scalar functions and therefore, only client-independent objects can be accessed in the AMDP method that implements the scalar function.

What is a client-safe repository object?

A client-safe object can access data of a single client only.

  • If an AMDP method is implemented in cloud-compliant ABAP, then it is implicitly client-safe.
  • A repository object that accesses only client-independent SQL data sources is implicitly client-safe and must access only client-safe objects.

AMDP does not support implicit client handling. Therefore, client safety must be delegated to the objects accessed in an AMDP method and declared in its USING list. 

More details on the requirements for defining client-safe AMDP methods. 

client Safety in AMDP 

Client safety in CDS view entities

entry.title: Re: Saving SAP ENABLE NOW SCORM file in a lower version
entry.content:
Hi,

Using Enable Now Producer, it is possible to publish content in all major versions of SCORM, including 1.2.  To do that:

1. Open Producer
2. Click on the Book object that is to be published as SCORM
3. Click the Publish Selected Object button
4. Set the Type value to SCORM

5. Open the SCORM section of properties and set the Version attribute to SCORM 1.2

6. Click OK

There is a lot of other things to know about successfully publishing SCORM, other than selecting the correct version number when publishing.  I recommend that you go through this video and make sure that your system and content is setup correctly before publishing or you may waste a lot of time.

Regards
Shane

entry.title: CDHDR CDPOS table size - data identification SQL query
entry.content:
Hi team, 

In our system, we can see change document tables CDHDR, CDPOS are very big and growing. We have checked related archiving objects and the cleanup program RSCDOK99. 
But we have requirement to identify area in which data is growing or lies in larger volume. 
We need to check the transactions and object IDs which are filling or present in maximum volume in CDHDR and in CDPOS respectively. Is there any way we can list of data in CDHDR by number of entries per transaction and same in CDPOS by number of entries object ID wise. An SQL query to pull data in this format or any other method. 

Thanks

Varun

entry.title: Extract Long Text on IW28 (notifications)
entry.content:
Hello, I am looking for Long Text (actual phrases) on the IW28 as a column (or many) but I can not.

I worked at a plant where we used "IW29" to extract the Long Text in almost 9 more columns (LT 1, LT 2, LT 3, etc.) so we could concatenate it afterward on Excel.

I work for another company now and I am looking if there is something similar but I have not succeeded.

 

I hope I am being clear about my question hopefully some of you could help me.

Regards!

entry.title: Re: Future of Electronic Bank Statement Processing in SAP S/4HANA Cloud - Release of 4X8
entry.content:
Hi wieser_anton,

you can use it on your release as well, it's available since release OP2019. But you will need to buy the additional scope item. Basically if you want to save some bucks, you would need to upgrade next year to the 2025 release, then this scope item is for free. (so maybe that would be a interim goal you can set in your company, to upgrade next year to 2025).

 

Best,

Edrilan

entry.title: Re: SAP Data Intelligence: Get notifications about your pipelines
entry.content:
Dear Yuliya, 

I have a couple of doubts. If I have 'N' amount of graphs scheduled every certain minutes throughout the day, using this graph to receive notifications should I remove the scheduling from the main graph and schedule this new graph?

I ask this because I have many graphs scheduled with different time intervals throughout the day.

Another question is, should I create a notification graph for each graph I have scheduled or can I use the same graph in some way that is dynamic for 'N' amount of graphs? Because the Pipeline operator asks for a specific graph's name and can't do many at the same time, am I right?

I would appreciate your comments on the doubts.

Excelent post, regards

entry.title: Co-product routing
entry.content:
Hello!

I have a base material that I make into many different sizes.
These different sizes are just listed as a co-product in the BOM. Some of these different sizes also have an additional BOM item applied, and this application takes significantly more time.
We run one order under the work center.

How can I correctly account for the difference in routing costs? I would like to avoid two different work centers; they are produced together at the same location.

Thank you!

entry.title: Re: "Send ERP Delivery Messages" PPF is not executing fro...
entry.content:
Hello,

Thanks for your reply.

I checked this path and removed the Inactive indicator.

But still when I create new Inbound Delivery, ppf action "Send ERP Delivery Messages" is still in yellow status and not getting executed.

When I see in more details of that ppf action, it shows Action profile as "/SCWM/PDI_01" and Action definition as "/SCWM/MSG_PRD_SEND". So this action definition is getting triggered.

But when i check in config of SPPFCADM, this action definition is not present. I assume this is something standard and we cant see this action definition in config.

Please correct me if I am wrong.

Thanks,

Onkar

entry.title: Re: Aggregation of rate elements with rate subelements Su...
entry.content:
Hi Carsten,

again, I'm extremely grateful for your support.

I'm much closer to the solution now, but not there yet.
I'd like to share the configuration I set up based on your advise hoping it might be useful to others as well.
As displayed in the screenshots, I created a new field, a new lookup table with output minimumQuantity and price, and I'm trying to complete the new price element specification with the suitable quantity indicator.
When I'm completing the suitable quantity indicator, the only possible value, both for field "initial qty" and "quantity 2",  is "quantity", some error messages say that:
- the 2 fields shouldn't not contain the same value
- the field value can only come from the available list (in this case the only option is (quantity" as already said, I cannot force a number in these fields for example)
-  both field must be filled in.

Is it also a new field "quantity1" necessary? if so, where will be the min and max value of the suitable quantity indicator be set (in my case 1 and 19)? in the lookup table data of my ZF_UsagePrice_minQty?
I'm very sorry for all the questions but it doesn't exist any real example of configuration of the suitable quantity indicator and I'm not sure how it should go further at this point.

Kr

entry.title: Hiring SAP APO DP SNP or IBP
entry.content:
We are HR Company ,currently we are hiring for a Leading Client based in Saudi Arabia(The client company details will be shared once CV is shortlisted)
100% remote
Long Term contract
Experience :
SAP APO DP - SNP or IBP Functional with knowledge of ABAP/debugging.
At least 5 years of SAP experience in implementing SAP APO
Functional/technical proficiency with at least 2+ full lifecycle SAP implementation
Should have theoretical or high-level conceptual knowledge on SPP
If interested send your CV to hr@thesmartarc.com

entry.title: Re: SAP Public Cloud - Segmentation (LO-SGT) Function Con...
entry.content:
Dear supported,

We have 2 questions based on your solution and segment in SAP

1. When we using MRP area for our business solution, we do planning on FERT level, and for each FERT (FERT A & FERT B) we can assign purchase info record to them for each different external subcontractor. And after MRP run, 2 different subcontracting PR will be generated for 2 FERT. However, raw materials are dependent requirement, after MRP run, even we use MRP areas, system will combine 2 requirement and generate only 1 PR for raw material. How can we separate 2 requirement and generate 2 different PR directly for same raw material? Please correct me if my understanding is wrong.

2.  For standard segment function, how can we activate standard segment function in SAP Public Cloud Edition? Cause I check we do have enabled function module of segment but we can not find any configuration or data for segment.

Thanks

entry.title: Re: PIR price change log
entry.content: TCODE ME1E helps but it does not provide ALV list for all PIRs

entry.title: Re: How to Block a Ship-to Location in SAP ByDesign
entry.content:
Dear customer,

This new functionality provides some business flexibility for blocked Logistics Area for some customers. Hence, there is no necessary to block a LOA if your business has no such request.

If you just want to test, you can follow the steps below to block a LoA.

  1. Navigate to Supply Chain Design Master Data Work Center.
  2. Go to Location View.
  3. Select the Site you wish.
  4. Choose Edit Layout.
  5. Select the LOA which you wanted to block.
  6. Choose Change Status- Block.
  7. Choose Save.

Then the LOA would be blocked.

 

Best regards,

Gavan

SAP Technical Support, Public Cloud ERP

entry.title: Re: The Payment Wizard was not executed [Message 3657-5]...
entry.content:
Hi,

Check Non-Included Transactions Report on Step 6 of the Payment Wizard run. If this has some system messages, it would direct you to the problem. You can check SAP Note 2070286 - Troubleshooting - Payment Wizard - Non-Included Transactions.

If there is none in this report, then check whether you have defined the bank account details for the Business Partner for which Payment Wizard is run.

Kr,

Jitin

entry.title: [BYD] How to block Ship-to Location related 2408 Update in SAP Business Bydesign
entry.content:
Dear SAP Support,

Could you please guide me on how to block a Ship-to Location?

With the 2408 update in ByDesign, a change was introduced titled "Create Stock Transfer Orders for Materials with Blocked Ship-To Locations." I would like to test this update on my system, but I am not sure how to set a Location to Blocked status.

Could you please provide a step-by-step guide on how to do this, including the specific Workcenter and View that should be used?

I need this answer for my customer.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: [BYD] How to block Ship-to Location related 2408 Upda...
entry.content:
Dear customer,

 

This new functionality provides some business flexibility for blocked Logistics Area for some customers.

Hence, there is no necessary to block a LOA if your business has no such request.

If you just want to test, you can follow the steps below to block a LoA.

  1. Navigate to Supply Chain Design Master Data Work Center.
  2. Go to Location View.
  3. Select the Site you wish.
  4. Choose Edit Layout.
  5. Select the LOA which you wanted to block.
  6. Choose Change Status- Block.
  7. Choose Save.

Then the LOA would be blocked. 

For more information about Blocking status, please view SAP Help Portal: Logistics Areas

 

Best regards,

Gavan

SAP Technical Support, Public Cloud ERP

entry.title: C_S4CFI_2402 - SAP Certified Associate - Implementation Consultant - SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Editio
entry.content:
Hello,

I have completed these SAP Learning Journeys that are required for C_S4CFI_2402 - SAP Certified Associate - Implementation Consultant - SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition - Financial Accounting:

1. Outlining the Financial Accounting Overview in SAP S/4HANA

2. Outlining the Record to Report Process in SAP S/4HANA

3. Describing the Receivables Management Process in SAP S/4HANA

4. Describing the Payables Management Process in SAP S/4HANA

5. Performing Asset Accounting Processes in SAP S/4HANA

6. Implementing SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition

I have completed all of the quiz questions for each learning journey and extensively studied the questions to a point where I can answer all the quiz questions with a 100% score.

I just attempted the sample questions provided on the certification page, and I found that they were extremely difficult and much different than the quiz questions for the required learning journeys.

I would like to ask everyone, if you think that being able to answer all of the quiz questions sucessfully is enough to pass the certification exam?

I would also like to ask everyone, if you can recommend some additional free study materials to better prepare for C_S4CFI_2402 - SAP Certified Associate - Implementation Consultant - SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition - Financial Accounting?

Thank you.

entry.title: Why key figure, Actuals Qty has figure in the future period in SAP IBP Demand?
entry.content:
Hi SAP IBP experts,

I have simple question.

The table below is copied from SAP IBP excel add-in, as my understanding, key figure, Actuals Qty, should be the historical delivered quantity, it should not have the figure in the future, but now it is August, why actuals qty has figure in the future period, like Sep, Oct, Nov. Dec.?

Thanks a lot.  

Product IDLocation IDCustomer IDKey FigureJun-24Jul-24Aug-24Sep-24Oct-24Nov-24Dec-24Jan-25Feb-25Mar-25Apr-25
HT_285HD_DC_CANA100Actuals Qty320460400560490520560    
   Confirmed Qty           
   Delivered Qty Adjusted320460400560490520560    
   Statistical Forecast Qty300375350500400400450361361361361

entry.title: Is it possible to specify a multiple hostname in .odbc.ini for Microsoft SQL ODBC driver ?
entry.content:
Can we maintain the multiple hostnames in syntax of Microsoft ODBC driver for SQL settings in .odbc.ini ?
Please find the below example for reference.

hanadm@myhostname:/usr/sap/HAN/home> more .odbc.ini
[MSSQL]
Driver/opt/microsoft/msodbcsql18/lib64/libmsodbcsql-18.2.so.1.1
Server=myhostname,1438
Encrypt=NO
Database=MySQLDB
hanadm@myhostname:/usr/sap/HAN/home>
 
Thanks,


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Is it possible to specify a multiple hostname in .odb...
entry.content:
Dear customer,

Please be informed that the feature is not supported in SDA.
Could you please take a look at the following information ?

  • Create an SQL Server Remote Source
    • [MSSQL1]
      Driver= /opt/microsoft/msodbcsql/lib64/libmsodbcsql-11.0.so.2260.0
      Server=<sql_server_name>,<sql_port> Database=<sql_database_name>

  • KBA 2180119 - FAQ: SAP HANA Smart Data Access
    • 25. Is it possible to configure failover for remote SDA sources?
      It is not possible to define multiple remote host names for failover reasons but you can enter a virtual host name of the remote source database that can be mapped to the proper IP address using DNS or other cluster techniques.


Best regards,
SAP Support

entry.title: Re: SAP Enterprise Threat Detection Cloud Edition 1.0.
entry.content: How can you monitor the availability of the SAP ETD Cloud Edition itself, if it is is up and running or in worst case if it is offline

entry.title: Re: Define Bank Accounts to be Included in PEPPOL
entry.content: Hello, It seems that a "Peppol-related" checkbox has been added to the My Bank section in the 2408 update. I have a few questions regarding this. If I set the "Peppol-related" checkbox for multiple My Bank entries, will all the My Bank entries with the checkbox checked be displayed in the XML? After multiple My Bank entries are displayed in the XML, when, where, and how is the bank account determined? Is it done within ByDesign or within SAP Document and Reporting Compliance? Is it mandatory to have a contract for SAP Document and Reporting Compliance in order to integrate ByDesign with Peppol?

entry.title: Re: SAP Business ByDesign – What’s New 24.08
entry.content:
Hello,

It seems that a "Peppol-related" checkbox has been added to the My Bank section in the 2408 update. I have a few questions regarding this.

  1. If I set the "Peppol-related" checkbox for multiple My Bank entries, will all the My Bank entries with the checkbox checked be displayed in the XML?
  2. After multiple My Bank entries are displayed in the XML, when, where, and how is the bank account determined? Is it done within ByDesign or within SAP Document and Reporting Compliance?
  3. Is it mandatory to have a contract for SAP Document and Reporting Compliance in order to integrate ByDesign with Peppol?

entry.title: Re: Account assignment mandatory for material (enter acc....
entry.content: Check in configuration of the material type. SPRO > LG > Material Master > Basic settings > Material types > define attributes For the plant(Val area) , both qty and value updating indicators should be set on. If value updation is unchecked, system would prompt to enter the account assignment category.

entry.title: Connection between Peppol and My Bank Account in Bydesign
entry.content:
Hello,

It seems that a "Peppol-related" checkbox has been added to the My Bank section in the 2408 update. I have a few questions regarding this.

  1. If I set the "Peppol-related" checkbox for multiple My Bank entries, will all the My Bank entries with the checkbox checked be displayed in the XML?
  2. After multiple My Bank entries are displayed in the XML, when, where, and how is the bank account determined? Is it done within ByDesign or within SAP Document and Reporting Compliance?
  3. Is it mandatory to have a contract for SAP Document and Reporting Compliance in order to integrate ByDesign with Peppol?

entry.title: Re: Unable to create a Remote Source from Hana database (...
entry.content:
The official tool to setup remote source connection for SDI is through web ide or web development workbench, you can choose to use any of the tools, or create through sql command, check the syntax below in our help document.
https://help.sap.com/docs/HANA_SMART_DATA_INTEGRATION/7952ef28a6914997abc01745fef1b607/444b1a87758345f6b39ba481a388cc7d.html

For hanastudio, this is a known issue to only show index server and since it is not offical tool for SDI, there won't be fix for that.

Best regards
Helen

entry.title: Re: Single selection in hierarchal input filter - SAC
entry.content: I'm not aware it was supported .

entry.title: Re: How can be select always last member value in input c...
entry.content: I would suggest to add few lines of code to select the last member via script API

entry.title: Can VLMOVE create an inbound delivery with movement type 301?
entry.content:
Hi,

We use VLMOVE to create delivery for movement type 301 based on handling units, and we also want to post goods by handling unit. This means the best way is to post goods through MIGO with "via Handl.Units". However, the delivery created in VLMOVE is an outbound delivery while outbound delivery is not an option in MIGO with A07/A08. With A01 we can enter the HU choosing screen but cannot move further.

Does anyone know how to create an 301 inbound delivery in VLMOVE? Or can we initiate "via Handl.Units" in MIGO with outbound delivery?

Thanks so much.

entry.title: Re: Task 3 - Enhancing CDS View Entities with Annotations
entry.content: with out *

entry.title: 回复： sortProperty and filterProperty not working, but colu...
entry.content:
Hi, you can try it. Set the 'sortProperty' and 'filterProperty' for Column.

<table:Column id="TimeBucketCol00" hAlign="End" minWidth="100" sortProperty="invoiceDescription" filterProperty="invoiceDescription">
</table:Column>

entry.title: Data Services 4.2 execute job from sap hana to mysql 8 report error
entry.content:
Hi all!

I install SAP IPS + DS 4.2 and configure local repository in hana db. I downloaded mysql8 jdbc driver and copy it to:

<LINK_DIR>\ext\lib

<BIP_INSTALL_DIR>\java\lib\im\<database_type>

<BIP_INSTALL_DIR>\warfiles\webapps\DataServices\WEB-INF\lib

and I restarted the EIM process server.

I also installed mysql8 odbc dirver in designer client windows environment . But when I created a mysql datastore, there was not a mysql8 option, only mysql 5.1 to 5.6 version in the designer client. I selected the 5.1 version and mysql8 windows system DSN, this was successful. I created a batch job and extract data from sap hana to mysql8, when I run the job, the error is:

The ODBC Driver Manager library for <mysql80> data sources is not set in the <MYSQL_5_1_DRIVERMANAGER> environment variable.

Set the <MYSQL_5_1_DRIVERMANAGER> environment variable by running '$LINK_DIR/bin/DSConnectionManager.sh'.

what shall I do next?

I am getting the below error:

I will appreciate if someone help me on this. Thank in advance.

entry.title: Triggering side effect on press of Delete button
entry.content:
We have a requirement in our RAP based unmanaged application.
When we delete the Child entity entry itself (in draft) using the standard delete action on UI, is there a way to trigger the side effects?
Because we want to control the enabling/disabling of the child's Create button on click of Delete.

In a Nutshell, I delete the child entity, can Parent entity be affected with Side effects? (Before we click save).

entry.title: Re: How to input multiple CSV files through FTP sender adapter in SAP CPI?
entry.content: Hello All, I have checked your advice. But still, it is not working on my end. Here are the 4 problems I faced when I tried your advice. 1)① Sender and Start Message is an one-to-one relationship ②only one Start Message can be placed in one Integration Flow. ③ Request Reply can only be connected to a Receiver. ④a Start Message Event cannot be placed in a Local Integration Flow (Only a Start Message Event can be connected to a Sender, and Start Event cannot)

entry.title: Re: How can MRP exception messages and reschedule dates i...
entry.content:
Hello Mridul,

As schedule lines are integrated to Ariba on weekly basis but there are high chances that the demand gets changed in between the week so the supplier wants to know whether any demand is being pushed or pulled so that he can plan the deliveries accordingly. It would be great if the pushed/pulled dates are shown against schedule lines in "Items to confirm" or "Items to ship" tiles but that would be a enhancement. Otherwise, if we can integrate these changes along with product activity messages that will also work.

Regards,

Chandra

entry.title: Recipe Workflow Not Appearing In User's Engineering Inbox
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

We have NWBC Master Recipe Management system. We uses some user groups (Process route) to assign the workflows to some users. Once the recipe has been submitted, users maintained in that groups receives this workflow in their Engineering Inbox for approval. But there is one user who is not able to receive this workflow in his inbox. Upon checking we found that this user has two mail IDs out of which the latest one is updated in SU01D, but still user is not able to receive this workflow. Can anyone tell me where we can check that on which mail ID system is sending the workflow. We only maintained users SAP ID in this groups so we are unable to find out the mail ID on which system is sending the workflow. Any help on this will be highly appreciated.

entry.title: Re: What is the use of Retention Period for Scores
entry.content:
Hi Kunal,

i have couple of doubts,

about your first point, is there a place where i can set the date when the score calculation should happen? i can only give for example 30days. i have no option to give exactly on which date. right?

Also to understand better, could you please give me any use case when the scores saved can be 30days and retention period is 2 days( basically less than scores saved period).

 

in general the use of Retention period is not clear for us. 🙂

 

Regards,

Amshu

entry.title: How to drill down on date while working on Live Modelling?
entry.content:

Afterward, I fetched those views in SAP Analytics Cloud where several fields of type Date/DateTime/Timestamp in these views. However, I'm encountering an issue where I cannot utilize the drill-down option of granularity of Year-Quarter-Month in reporting.

Could you please assist me with this? I’d appreciate any guidance on how to enable drill-down functionality for these fields.

Thank you for your help!

entry.title: Unable to assign Warehouse with Storage location and plant
entry.content:
Hi,

We have TDD system, and we are working with SAP S4 Hana Public Cloud Embedded Warehouse Management, created Cloud Warehouse and Warehouse number but I am not getting any option for warehouse and storage location assignment. 

Kindly suggest.

Thanks,

Sanjay

entry.title: Custom changes in GGB1 doesn't carry over or apply
entry.content:
So we created a custom logic in GGB1 specifically in exit U0001. Z_OBJECT calls the U0001. 

Since the ZOBJECT, I have created a logic for BSEG-FDTAG.

Initially, the value of BSEG-FDTAG is initial and my logic is below:

BSEG-FDTAG = SY-DATUM + BSEG-ZBD1T. Assuming the values will be 08/31/2024

However, after exiting the ZOBJECT, the value of BSEG-FDTAG will be 00000000 again. Why does that happen?

The flow of FDTAG determination is like this:

ZOBJECT> sapff001> ZOBJECT. 

The first time it will go through the ZOBJECT the FDTAG will be 08/31/2024. Then it will go to the program sapff001, there, the value of FDTAG will be 00/00/0000 before computation.

There is a computation for FDTAD in sapff001 however, the conditions were not satisfied hence, I'm not getting the correct results.

entry.title: Streamlining Document Management: DocuSign and SAP Sales Cloud V2 Integration via BTP
entry.content:
In today’s digital era, streamlining document workflows is essential for businesses to stay competitive. Integrating DocuSign, a leading e-signature solution, with SAP Sales Cloud V2 can enhance the efficiency of managing contracts and agreements directly within your CRM system. Leveraging SAP BTP Open Connectors, this integration becomes seamless, allowing for a smooth exchange of data between DocuSign and SAP Sales Cloud V2.

There is no standard integration available between DocuSign and SAP Sales Cloud V2. However, we developed this integration as a proof of concept (POC) using SAP BTP Open Connectors. This POC demonstrates how businesses can streamline their document workflows by connecting DocuSign with SAP Sales Cloud V2. The integration was custom-built to showcase the potential benefits, including improved efficiency and better data management. Although this solution is not out-of-the-box, it serves as a solid foundation for future implementations tailored to specific business needs.

Why Integrate DocuSign with SAP Sales Cloud V2?

Integrating DocuSign with SAP Sales Cloud V2 brings several advantages:

  1. Improved Efficiency: Automate the process of sending, signing, and storing documents, reducing the need for manual intervention.
  2. Enhanced Compliance: Ensure all documents are securely stored and easily retrievable, meeting legal and regulatory requirements.
  3. Seamless User Experience: Allow users to manage the entire document lifecycle within SAP Sales Cloud V2, avoiding the need to switch between platforms.  

 

Prerequisites:

  • SAP BTP Account
  • DocuSign Account
  • SAP Sales Cloud V2 Access
  • Open Connectors Setup
  • OAuth2 Authentication Knowledge
  • Integration Suite Knowledge

Overview of SAP BTP Open Connectors

SAP BTP Open Connectors is a key component of the SAP Business Technology Platform (BTP) that simplifies and accelerates the connectivity to third-party applications. With over 160 pre-built connectors, Open Connectors provides a unified API layer to integrate various services with SAP solutions.

For our integration, Open Connectors will act as the bridge between SAP Sales Cloud V2 and DocuSign, enabling seamless communication and data exchange.

Step-by-Step Integration Guide : Setting Up DocuSign in SAP BTP Open Connectors

  1. Access SAP BTP Cockpit:
    • Log in to your SAP BTP Cockpit and navigate to the Open Connectors service.
  2. Create a Connector Instance:
    • In the Open Connectors dashboard, search for "DocuSign" and create a new connector instance.
    • Provide necessary credentials such as the API key, account ID, and user authentication details to establish the connection.
  3. Configure Authentication:
    • Follow the prompts to authenticate the DocuSign account using OAuth2. This ensures secure communication between SAP BTP and DocuSign.

Integrating with SAP Sales Cloud V2: Create a Custom Integration Flow

    • In SAP BTP Integration Suite, create a new integration flow to connect SAP Sales Cloud V2 with DocuSign.
    • Use the Open Connectors adapter to integrate the DocuSign connector instance you previously set up.

Define the Integration Logic:

    • Map the fields between SAP Sales Cloud V2 and DocuSign. For instance, map customer details, document templates, and signature fields.
    • Configure triggers for the integration, such as automatically sending a document for signature when a sales order reaches a certain status.

Deploying the Integration :Deploy the Integration Flow

    • Once testing is successful, deploy the integration flow in the SAP BTP Integration Suite.
    • Monitor the flow to ensure smooth operation and handle any exceptions that may occur.

Story Flow

1.Generate a sales quote

2.Please set the status and send the quote to DocuSign for approval.

3.The Contact of the Account will receive an email notification.

4.Please review the document and sign it

5.Once the document is signed and the 'Finish' button is clicked, the signed document will be returned to the Sales Quote

6.Click on the preview icon to view the document.

Conclusion

Integrating DocuSign with SAP Sales Cloud V2 via SAP BTP Open Connectors provides a robust solution to streamline your document workflows. This integration not only enhances efficiency but also ensures that your sales processes are more secure and compliant.

By following the steps outlined in this guide, you can leverage the full potential of both DocuSign and SAP Sales Cloud V2, driving better outcomes for your business.

Thank you, Zen

entry.title: Re: Annotation to add Parameters for Intent Based Navigat...
entry.content: Hi All, did you got any solution to map Parameter value

entry.title: SAP Datasphere Replication Flows: Error Object-Queue / Calculation not finished, ACD doesn't exist
entry.content:
Dear SAP Datasphere Community,

yesterday, I stumbled upon an issue for which I could not find the problem, since the error message does not tell what and where the root cause is lying and what the solution is 🤔

I’m wondering how long it is going to take until SAP provides error messages providing the solution, to prevent a new incident?!

FYI: After the last S4 update in March 2024, I updated this week again all the required CNV_NOTE_ANALYZER_DI notes in the S4 Dev. system.

There are currently two main problems I’m facing and hopefully the one or the other member here has already found out the root case and solution to maybe help be out?!

Error 1:

I have one Replication Flow containing 31 CDS Views, all for texts, which are loaded in “Initial only” mode. Initially, all the replications failed with this error:

English:

Abonnement Interface error / User JOB_User is not authorized, to process changes for Abonn. RMS

I changed nothing, just checked that user JOB_USER is valid (and still has SAP_ALL), then repeated the run, and the result is: 2/3 of the updates worked, 1/3 failed:

Error message now:

Either:  Partitioning for Object I_CONDITIONTYPETEXT failed

Or: Abonnement Interface error / User JOB_User is not authorized, to process changes for Abonn. RMS / Error with access to Object-Queue / Calculation not finished, but ACD doesn't exist for Object I_COMPANY CODE (Type DDLS).

The only note which gives a hint regarding “ACD” is this one from July 2023: https://me.sap.com/notes/3360383/E

Which contains: “Calculation not finished but ACD doesn't exists for object ... (type DDLS)”

Error 2:

I also started 2 replication flows with “Initial and Delta” for transactional data (Orders and Invoice items)… and all the records got transferred successfully… but the CDC Monitor does not show any single entry any more:

and

In our Dev system, there is the specialty that development takes place in client 100, and test data exists only in client 110. So all the extraction is done for client 110.

The Health check is running fine in both clients:

And also the two DELTA PUSH jobs (for the initialization) have been running fine:

Has anyone an idea what else to check... otherwise I will open an Incident for this.

Edit: Even SLG1 protocols does not show anything for the DWCREMOTE User in our connection - in earlier issue cases at least a log has been writting... but here: Nothing.

Thanks a lot for reading. BR, Martin

entry.title: Re: SAP Service and Asset Manager 2405 Now Available – What’s New?
entry.content: Dynamic form is interesting.

entry.title: Attribute-based access control in SAP Signavio Process Insights
entry.content:
SAP Signavio Process Insights Attribute-based access management is now general availability (GA) in all regions.

This is enabling you to limit access for your users to combinations of companies 🏛, plants 🏭 and sales organization 💰 values in addition to the already existing system-based and functional access control. Here is a quick demo:

The new "Create Policy" option is available for SAP on-premise source systems and allows you to configure access not only at system level, but also based on organizational attributes and their values from connected source systems.

If you already have any systems connected for which system access is restricted to specific users, system-specific authorization policies named "All Attribute Values" are available automatically for each system. These authorization policies allow full access to all data for the previously specified users in the same way as before.

  • The details on how to configure attribute-based access management are available in our help
  • You find all details on what is new in our help (don't forget to subscribe).

Interested to learn more about the merits of Signavio Process Insights? Here you can see how to find ways to optimize your liquidity:

Here you can learn more:

  1. Your first steps to get started with SAP Signavio Process Insights
  2. Who do I need to involve and which challenges do I want to solve?
  3. How to start your analysis?
  4. “Cash is King” - but how to become royal? - SAP Community
  5. Why are there two business process analysis soluti... - SAP Community
  6. Plug & Gain:
    Plug & Gain OpenSAP
    How to use the Plug & Gain Connector
  7. SAP Analytics Cloud Content for Process Insights
  8. SAP Learning:
    SAP Signavio Process Analysis
    SAP Signavio Process Management & Design
    SAP Signavio Solution Configuration
  9. Partner Edge (Login required): Webinar Series for Process Insights
  10. SAP Signavio Process Insights "Whats New?"
  11. SAP Signavio Process Insights Help

entry.title: Re: Resource scheduling app- Order operation is confirmed but in scheduling still showing not comple
entry.content:
Greetings,

do you indicate that work is done with "Final confirmation indicator" when you are posting confirmations?

Best regards, Matjaž.

entry.title: Re: How to restrict the webhook event notifications from...
entry.content:
Hi @DeepakGupta,

Good day.

By managing webhook configurations individually at the site level and ensuring that they are set up specifically for each child site, you can effectively restrict webhook event notifications in SAP CDC. This way, events like 'register' configured in Child Site A will not trigger webhooks in Child Site B.

Considerations:

  • Permissions and Scope: Make sure that webhook configurations are correctly scoped to only the desired child site. This means double-checking that each webhook is set up with the appropriate filters and criteria to ensure it only triggers when events occur within its specific site.

  • Testing: Before deploying these configurations in a production environment, perform extensive testing to confirm that webhooks are firing only for the desired child sites and not across all sites inadvertently.

Best Regards,
Preethi G
SAP CDC Consultant

entry.title: Re: CATS_GET_TARGET_HOURS
entry.content: ALWAYS A THIRD PARTY TOOL DOES THAT
